Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN GEARINGER & ATTY. COLLEEN B. KELLY OF THE GEARINGER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-415-440-3175 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. HILARY E. YOUNGBLOOD OF THE DB LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-415-956-4800 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PAIGE BISCHOFF'S motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is denied. None of plaintiff's proposed new claims are actionable as a matter of law. Plaintiff's privacy interest in the two page 2005 registration document which forms the basis of all of her new claims was not violated by the manner in which defendant used that document. Defendant's conduct with respect to that document is well within the scope of permissible conduct in the defense of litigation. While normally the preferred procedure is to allow an amended pleading to be filed and litigate the validity of the new matters therein by demurrer or a pleadings motion, to do so here would contravene judicial economy. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk
